topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Industry Competition
topics.summary: The studio explores Howard Stern's success on satellite radio, discussing the platform's growth compared to terrestrial radio and its impact on industry competitors.

topics.title: Radio Programming and Industry Management
topics.summary: The studio discusses recent radio segments, the work ethic of executive Scott Greenstein, and a humorous comparison between former host Jackie's current lifestyle and his previous routine.

topics.title: Comedy Tapes and Voice Acting Careers
topics.summary: The studio explores past comedy recordings with Jackie Marley, the legacy of Rodney Dangerfield, and a guest appearance by voice actress E.G. Daly.

topics.title: Voiceover Actress Shares Experience of John Eric Curtis's
topics.summary: The show features a voiceover actress who recounts her relationship and the traumatic experience of being at the hospital following the death of actor John Eric Curtis.

topics.title: Voice Actress Discusses Past Relationships and Career
topics.summary: The show features a voice actress discussing her past relationships with celebrities, her experience in the sex tape industry, and her upcoming music releases.

topics.title: Pat Cooper Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a tense conversation with Pat Cooper regarding his past career, personal relationships, and the reasons behind their professional falling out.

topics.title: Pat's Reunion and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Pat discussing his reunion with Howard Stern, the loss of his wife, his current relationship with a friend of her late wife, and his struggles with physical intimacy following his period of mourning.

topics.title: Pat Cooper's Roast Experience
topics.summary: The studio explores Pat Cooper's experiences as a roast comic, his interactions with celebrities like Jerry Lewis and Michael Spinks, and the personal challenges he faces in his dating life.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Techniques and Sirius Growth
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with comedian Pat Cooper regarding the art of roasting, followed by an analysis of Sirius satellite radio's subscriber growth and a guest appearance by Andy Dick.

topics.title: Andy Dick and Son Lucas Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features Andy Dick and his son Lucas as they discuss their relationship, the complexities of growing up with a public figure, and various anecdotes regarding past media appearances.

topics.title: Andy Dick and Son Lucas
topics.summary: The studio features Andy Dick and his son, Lucas, who discuss the comedian's history with substance abuse, their personal relationship, and an incident involving Lucas dating his father's girlfriend.

topics.title: Andy Dick and Sirius Satellite Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Andy Dick followed by discussions regarding Sirius satellite growth, new hardware features, and upcoming programming.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity divorce rumors involving Matt Lauer and Britney Spears, the ongoing drama surrounding Anna Nicole Smith, and a discussion on popular film genres.

topics.title: Luxury Watch Discussion and News Reports
topics.summary: The studio discusses the high cost of luxury watches, Robin Williams' personal journey with sobriety, and news reports regarding Congressman Mark Foley and a deadly shooting at an Amish school.

topics.title: Amish Community Shooting and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a shooting in an Amish community, the luxury watch market, North Korean nuclear threats, celebrity news, and upcoming tour dates.
